# Ghost Access Starter Incident Note Template

## Status

Use this for a paid one-time Starter Incident Support case. The note should be
short enough to send to the buyer after one focused diagnostic pass.

Do not include raw subscription URLs, UUIDs, private keys, seed phrases, wallet
recovery words, bot tokens, QR codes, full profile links, database dumps,
screenshots with credentials, or personal payment details.

## Header

- Case ID:
- Date:
- Contact nickname:
- Access path nickname:
- Payment verification: `verified` / `pending` / `not-required` / `failed`
- Delivery status: `draft` / `sent` / `needs-follow-up`

## Buyer Symptom

Write only what the buyer can see.

- Visible symptom:
- When it started:
- Affected device/client:
- Affected users:
- Desired visible result:

## Scope

- Included:
- Excluded:
- Explicit non-promises:

## Checks Performed

Use redacted evidence only.

| Check | Result | Evidence | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| User-visible symptom | `ok/degraded/failing/unknown` | | |
| Access lifecycle | `ok/degraded/failing/unknown` | redacted path/hash only | |
| Server/listener/process health | `ok/degraded/failing/unknown` | redacted path/hash only | |
| Client compatibility | `ok/degraded/failing/unknown` | redacted path/hash only | |

- Fixed: `yes/no/not-attempted`

- Remaining risk:

## Buyer Message

```text
Статус: ___.

Что видно: ___.
Что проверено: ___.
Вероятная причина: ___.
Что делать дальше: ___.
Что я специально не делал: ___.

Секреты в чат не собирались: raw subscription links, UUID, приватные ключи,
QR-коды и токены не нужны для этого вывода.
```

## Privacy Confirmation

- Raw subscription URLs collected: `no`
- Private keys collected: `no`
- Seed phrases collected: `no`
- UUIDs pasted into chat: `no`
- Bot tokens collected: `no`
- QR codes collected: `no`
- Screenshots with credentials retained: `no`
- Personal payment details stored: `no`
